---
title: "Digit Recognition with MLP from Scratch"
subtitle: "Using a MLP to classify digits"
author: "Nigel Gebodh"
categories: [Deep Learning, ML, Computer Vision, Image Recognition, TensorFlow, Keras]
date: "2022-01-01"
# reference-location: margin
back-to-top-navigation: false
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<iframe 
    src="https://nbviewer.org/github/ngebodh/MachineLearning/blob/master/DeepLearning/ImageRecog/DeepLearning_DigitClassificationWithKeras.ipynb"
	frameborder="0"
    style="position:  relative; 
    top: 0%; 
    left: 0; 
    width: 100%; 
    height: 100%;"
    allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
```
